headline: Q1 Earnings Roundup: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) And The Rest Of The Building Materials Segment
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) and the rest of the building materials stocks fared in Q1.
